sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Key objects ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('p', 'M', 'W', 'w', 'G'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if node['pixels'] >= 5 or (node['color'] in ('p','M','G') and node['pixels'] < 5):
            print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Trace the path
print("\n=== Path trace ===")
for r in range(15, 62):
    line = ascii_lines[r]
    non_b = [(c, line[c]) for c in range(25, 45) if line[c] not in ('B', 'g', 'G')]
    if non_b:
        print(f"Row {r}: {non_b}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- The white diamond appeared at (38-42, 31-35) - the purple square's old position
- The purple square moved to (47-51, 28-32)
So clicking the magenta center of the purple square:
- Converts the purple square into a white diamond at its position
